notes: Exceptional artefact: problem framed as a genuine data portability and consent integrity gap with named affected parties; four specific personas with role, timing, and cost; MVP tightly bounded to raw data types with enriched insights explicitly deferred under a hard regulatory rationale (CPG 220); six named out-of-scope items with reasons; eight genuine uncertainties flagged with risk-if-wrong; five success indicators anchored to baselines and targets; constraints sourced from NZ regulatory frameworks and product context with no fabrication.
